headline: Norwegian Cruise Q4 Earnings Meet Estimates, Revenues Lag, Stock Down
summary: NCLH's Q4 results reflect year-over-year growth, but a revenue miss and macro concerns tied to rising oil prices pressure shares.

raw.headline: Norwegian Cruise Q4 Earnings Meet Estimates, Revenues Lag, Stock Down
raw.summary: NCLH's Q4 results reflect year-over-year growth, but a revenue miss and macro concerns tied to rising oil prices pressure shares.

headline: Travel stocks fall after thousands of flights grounded following Iran strikes
summary: Airlines and some hotel stocks fell after the U.S.-Israeli attacks on Iran and subsequent retaliation strikes.

raw.headline: Travel stocks fall after thousands of flights grounded following Iran strikes
